revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Year in continent category/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Year in continent category/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Year in continent category/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Year in continent category/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Year in continent category/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Year in continent category/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} == Usage == Syntax is changing. While changeover is underway, both old and versions are supported === Old syntax, with parameters === Example: for [[:Category:2023 in Africa]], enter {{Year in continent category|2|0|2|3|Africa}} === New syntax, without parameters === Example: for [[:Category:2023 in Africa]], enter {{Year in continent category}} No parameters needed == See also == * [[Template:Year in country category]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} == Usage == Syntax is changing. While changeover is underway, both old and versions are supported === Old syntax, with parameters === Example: for [[:Category:2023 in Africa]], enter {{Year in continent category|2|0|2|3|Africa}} === New syntax, without parameters === Example: for [[:Category:2023 in Africa]], enter {{Year in continent category}} No parameters needed == See also == * [[Template:Year in country category]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} == Usage == Syntax is changing. While changeover is underway, both old and versions are supported === Old syntax, with parameters === Example: for [[:Category:2023 in Africa]], enter {{Year in continent category|2|0|2|3|Africa}} === New syntax, without parameters === Example: for [[:Category:2023 in Africa]], enter {{Year in continent category}} No parameters needed == See also == * [[Template:Year in country category]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

While changeover is underway, both old and versions are supported === Old syntax, with parameters === Example: for [[:Category:2023 in Africa]], enter {{Year in continent category|2|0|2|3|Africa}} === New syntax, without parameters === Example: for [[:Category:2023 in Africa]], enter {{Year in continent category}} No parameters needed == See also == * [[Template:Year in country category]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} == Usage == Syntax is changing. While changeover is underway, both old and versions are supported === Old syntax, with parameters === Example: for [[:Category:2023 in Africa]], enter {{Year in continent category|2|0|2|3|Africa}} === New syntax, without parameters === Example: for [[:Category:2023 in Africa]], enter {{Year in continent category}} No parameters needed == See also == * [[Template:Year in country category]] {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

While changeover is underway, both old and versions are supported === Old syntax, with parameters === Example: for [[:Category:2023 in Africa]], enter {{Year in continent category|2|0|2|3|Africa}} === New syntax, without parameters === Example: for [[:Category:2023 in Africa]], enter {{Year in continent category}} No parameters needed == See also == * [[Template:Year in country category]] {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Chronology category header templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
